message:
test(proptest): add 45 property tests for 3 uncovered modules

- proptest_asupersync_observability.rs (13 tests): serde roundtrips for
  ObservabilityConfig, TelemetrySnapshot, IncidentContext, SloBreachSummary;
  computed metric contracts (ratios, health distribution, tier derivation)
- proptest_manifest_dep_eradication.rs (18 tests): serde roundtrips for
  DepSection, DepCondition, EradicationAction, ManifestFinding,
  EradicationStep, EradicationPlan, FeatureAlignment; standard plan
  structural invariants; progress/grouping contracts
- proptest_runtime_compat_surface_guard.rs (14 tests): serde roundtrips
  for SurfaceApiEntry, UnwrappedCallSite, SurfaceGuardCheck,
  RegressionType, SurfaceRegression, SurfaceGuardReport; finalize
  invariants; summary rendering; regression grouping

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
